title: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon Declares War on Clarity Act, Calls Coinbase’s Armstrong ‘Full of Sh*t’
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, in a Fox Business interview on Friday, called the Clarity Act 'dead on arrival' and accused Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong of driving the legislation, calling him 'full of sh*t.' Dimon argues the crypto market structure bill threatens the traditional financial system.
body:
JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon has publicly declared war on the Clarity Act, a pending crypto market structure legislation, calling it a threat to the financial system. In a Fox Business interview on Friday, Dimon unloaded on the bill, calling it 'dead on arrival' as written, and singled out Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong, saying he is 'full of sh*t' and accusing him of driving the legislation.

Dimon argued that the Clarity Act, as currently drafted, poses significant risks to the stability of the financial system and needs to be carefully reconsidered. He emphasized that the legislation must not harm traditional financial institutions. The comments mark an escalation in the long-running feud between traditional banking leaders and the crypto industry, which has been pushing for clearer regulatory frameworks.

This debate matters to everyday people because it could shape the future of crypto regulation. If the Clarity Act is passed in its current form, it could impact how crypto exchanges operate and how consumers interact with digital assets. Dimon's opposition highlights the deep tension between Wall Street incumbents and the crypto sector.

For those interested in the outcome, watch for potential revisions to the Clarity Act and how lawmakers respond to Dimon's criticism. The next steps will likely involve further committee discussions and possible amendments to the legislation. Stay informed on this development, as the battle lines in Washington could significantly affect the crypto market and investor protections.
twitterThread: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon just called the Clarity Act 'dead on arrival' and Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong 'full of sh*t.' Here's why it matters for crypto.
Dimon claims the legislation threatens the traditional financial system and needs major revisions. The battle lines are drawn in Washington over crypto regulation.

This fight could shape the future of crypto regulation. Watch for revisions to the Clarity Act and how lawmakers respond. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-30-jpmorgan-ceo-jamie-dimon-blasts-crypto-clarity-act-and-coinbases-ceo
